name: documentation
description: Markdown documentation skill for README files, guides, reference docs, and architecture notes.

interface.shortDescription: Write clearer project documentation in Markdown.
interface.longDescription: Packages a repo-first documentation workflow for README files, how-to guides, reference pages, migration notes, and architecture docs in a clear, compact style.
defaultPrompt: Use the writer skill to rewrite this README so the setup steps are easier to scan.
Draft a how-to guide for this workflow from the repo files.
Turn this code and config into a short API reference page.
